**Source:** [Device Tree Specification](https://devicetree-specification.readthedocs.io/)

## reset-names

Property name: `reset-names`

Value type: `<stringlist>`

Reset signal name strings sorted in the same order as the `resets` property.

---

**Source:** Linux kernel Documentation

```
 - reset-names : Must include the following entries: "gmi"
```
